---
title: "Comparaison sndsTools vs requête manuelle avec R"
author: "SNDStoolers"
date: "2026-03-03"
output:
  html_document:
    bookdown::html_document2:
      base_format: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
    %\VignetteIndexEntry{Comparaison sndsTools vs requête manuelle avec R}
    %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
    %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
resources:
- name: img
  files: img/
---


## La requête {.tabset}

### `sndsTools`

```{r, echo = T}
print("SNDS TOOLS")
plot(rnorm(30))
```


### base R

```{r, echo = T}
plot(rnorm(30))
```


## Les résultats {.tabset}

### `sndsTools`

```{r}
print("TODO sndsTOOLS")
```

### base R
```{r}
print("TODO base R")
```
